response.step_by_step_log:
The video contains two vocal performances. 
1. The first song, 'Identity', is introduced by on-screen text. I searched for 'Identity hololive Japanese and English lyrics'. 
2. The second song, 'Gyouan Death' (暁闇エクスデス), is introduced with on-screen text including the song title and artist 'Secret Society holoX'. I searched for '暁闇エクスデス hololive Japanese and English lyrics'. 
I was unable to retrieve the full text lyrics for both songs within the tool limitations, so those fields are set to null.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed by Hololive production members during their 2025 countdown live event. The performance begins with 'Identity' and transitions to 'Gyouan Death'.

scenes.description: Characters sing 'Identity', with title and performer information shown on screen.
Characters perform 'Gyouan Death', with title and artist information shown on screen.
